title: BOS Engineering Event Schema
description: Normative machine-readable contract for the Voss Behavioral OS engineering event log. Source of truth for ingestion, codegen, and validation. Human spec: .planning/BOS-EVENT-SCHEMA.md.
$comment: schema_version=1; breaking changes increment schema_version and require a migration note in BOS-EVENT-SCHEMA.md; additive changes (new optional field, new event_type under an existing category, filling a reserved payload) do NOT bump. Mirrors PROTOCOL.md v + migration-note convention. PROJECTION-DERIVED fields (never source-carried, D-03): ingest_time, trace_id, caused_by. external_identity_ref is the RESERVED BOS12 cross-integration identity hook (present-but-null in v1). Security: payloads MUST NOT carry secrets/credentials/PII; payload fields are enumerated, not free-form dumps; inherit the existing session-redaction invariant (tests/harness/test_session_redaction.py).

envelope.description: Common bitemporal envelope present on every event of every category (D-01, D-02, D-03, D-04).

event_id.description: Stable unique id; derived from source id (swarm id / run id / node id).

event_type.description: Namespaced discriminator, e.g. task.completed, session.started. Namespaced by category so external categories add values without colliding.

category.description: 9-value taxonomy (D-01). LIVE: session, swarm, task, file. RESERVED: review, ci, validation, deploy, incident (field detail deferred to BOS12).

event_time.description: Actual/valid time — when it occurred in the world. FROM SOURCE timestamp. (Fowler actual time; SQL:2011 valid time; XTDB valid-time.)

ingest_time.description: Transaction/record time — when BOS recorded it. PROJECTION-ASSIGNED, never source-derived. Invariant: ingest_time >= event_time; for retroactive outcomes ingest_time > event_time. (Fowler record time; SQL:2011 transaction time; XTDB transaction-time.)

trace_id.description: Root correlation id threading the full lineage (D-04). PROJECTION-DERIVED (join of originating user-task/root-session id; swarm runs inherit; standalone runs use session id).

parent_event_id.description: Lineage parent event id; null at a root event. Partial source derivability (parent_id / parent_run_id / lineage_parent_id).

caused_by.description: Explicit causation pointer (D-04). PROJECTION-DERIVED; null when no explicit cause.

actor.description: Who/what produced the event (operator/coordinator/builder/system). Partial source derivability (swarm actor; missing on watch/some SSE).

source_ref.description: Provenance back-pointer to the originating harness record (D-03 derivation proof).

external_identity_ref.description: RESERVED hook for BOS12 cross-integration identity resolution (D-04 scope note). Present-but-null for all live (v1) events.
external_identity_ref.$comment: BOS12 will populate this with cross-integration identity (e.g. same human across Git/PM/CI accounts). Null in v1.

payload.description: Category/type-specific fields. Bound per-category by the top-level oneOf. Consumers MUST ignore unknown payload keys (additive-tolerant, mirrors extra=ignore).

payload.session.description: LIVE session-category payload. Sources: SessionRecord + SSE final/status/stream.finalize + RunRecord.

tokens.description: Optional token accounting (input/output/cache) from SSE status.

payload.session.$comment: Closed payload: new optional fields are additive (no version bump). Security: no secrets/PII — inherit session-redaction invariant.

payload.swarm.description: LIVE swarm-category payload. Sources: swarm.create/swarm.assign + SSE swarm.gate/needs_operator/complete.

payload.task.description: LIVE task-category payload. Sources: swarm.task/swarm.worker_done + RunRecord (goal, exit_reason in EXIT_REASONS, changed[]) + SSE plan.

run_id.description: RunRecord id when the task is an agent run.

plan_steps.description: From SSE plan.steps[]. Closed-shape not enforced (additive).

payload.task.$comment: Closed payload: additive-tolerant. exit_reason is the EXIT_REASONS enum (done/timeout/interrupt/budget/error). No secrets/PII.

payload.file.description: LIVE file-category payload. PRIMARY source: RunRecord.changed/inspected/avoided (correlated, run-scoped). SECONDARY source: watch/backend.py (ts_ms epoch ms, NO correlation — best-effort, requires enrichment). SSE tool(fs_*).

operation.description: created/modified/deleted/moved from watch; inspected/avoided from RunRecord.

task_id.description: Correlation; null for uncorrelated watch events (best-effort).

ts_ms.description: Raw watch epoch-ms timestamp; normalized to event_time by the projection (Pitfall 5).

payload.file.$comment: Closed payload: additive-tolerant. file events are never orphaned: trace_id + parent_event_id always thread back to the owning task. No secrets/PII (no file contents — paths only).

payload.reserved.description: RESERVED external-category stub (review, ci, validation, deploy, incident). Envelope-only in v1; an external event validates against the envelope today with zero version bump.
payload.reserved.$comment: field detail deferred to BOS12 — payload shape will be filled without a schema_version bump (additive under an existing category).
